zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon於1313年4月13日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯時，她的父親Charles de Valois comte de Valois43歲，母親Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul20歲。她於1336年2月10日與Duc Pierre De Bourbon I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年7月26日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年70歲，埋葬在法國瑟芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon was born on 13 April 1313, in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, her father, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, was 43 and her mother, Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul, was 20. She married Duc Pierre De Bourbon I on 10 February 1336. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 26 July 1383, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Paris, Seine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon est née le 13 avril 1313, à Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Duc Pierre De Bourbon I le 10 février 1336. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1383, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Paris, Seine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon am 13. April 1313 in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles de Valois comte de Valois 43 und ihre Mutter Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul 20. Sie hat am 10. Februar 1336 Duc Pierre De Bourbon I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1383 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Seine, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Duc Pierre De Bourbon I il 10 febbraio 1336. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1383, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Paris, Seine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbonが1313年4月13日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンヴィンセンスで生まれた時，父Charles de Valois comte de Valoisは43歳，母Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paulは20歳であった。1336年2月10日にDuc Pierre De Bourbon Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年7月26日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで70歳で死去し，フランスセアインパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon(이)가 1313년 4월 13일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 빈스네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1336년 2월 10일 Duc Pierre De Bourbon I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 7월 26일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon nasceu em 13 de abril de 1313, em Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul, tinha 20 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Valois d'Orleans, Duchesse de Bourbon родилась 13 апреля 1313 г. в местности винценнесь, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Chatillon-St-Paul, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duc Pierre De Bourbon I 10 февраля 1336 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июля 1383 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности пэрис, син, Франция.
